title: StandingOrderTypeValues
description: Specifies the type of standing order. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: User Defined Standing Order
x-enumeration-literals.description: Liquidity transfer standing order type, that has been customised or defined to the specific need of the user.(ISO20022)
